__fixture__.name: start_center_recent_work_privacy_reduced
__fixture__.scenario: Shared-device launch with privacy_reduction_mode = hide_paths active on the Start Center. The recent-work row's presentation_subtitle is redacted to its target-kind class (remote_repository) without raw host, raw URL, or raw path. Account affordances for this row are also hidden (hide_account_affordances-style redaction applied); the row still renders typed safe-recovery actions (open_restricted, unpin, remove_from_recents) so the row is not stranded. freshness_class = cached_with_timestamp with cached_timestamp_class = hours_ago so the user sees cache age without the raw timestamp. target_state = reachable but the row is served from the last-validated cache since the privacy-reduced launch did not re-reach the canonical owner. privacy_redaction_applied names the closed redaction field classes subtitle_path and account_affordance; last_opened_at is also bucketed. account_opt_in_posture = deferred_review_pending reflects that provider-linked affordances are suppressed until the user explicitly exits privacy-reduced mode. Demonstrates §3.5 rule 2: a surface that silently hides rows without a visible privacy notice banner would be non-conforming; the wrapping start_center_surface_record is responsible for emitting the privacy_reduced_mode_notice banner.
contract_sections: §12.4 Privacy-reduced Start Center on a shared device

presentation_subtitle: Remote repository · path hidden in privacy-reduced mode
